series_metadata.series_description: Record series includes forms submitted to the Department by business taxpayers to apply for refunds for Commercial Activity Tax, Petroleum Activity Tax, Financial Institution Tax, Sales/Use Tax, 911 Charge, or Resort Tax. Series also includes any supporting documentation provided by the taxpayer to support their refund claim.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 4 years after the denial or payment of the refund, then destroy. If scanned, retain 6 months after scanned and imaged, then shred. ; Electronic: Retain 4 years, then delete., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
